description_long: This is a rectangular cake with a visually striking, colorful printed image on its top surface, bordered by a decorative edge of piped yellow or gold icing. The image appears to be a high-resolution edible print, possibly featuring a collage of fruits and other vibrant elements, giving the cake a celebratory and festive appearance. The sides of the cake are plain, with the focus clearly on the ornate top. The piped border is consistent and evenly spaced, adding a touch of elegance and framing the central image. The cake is relatively flat and wide, suggesting it is designed for sharing at a large gathering or event. There are no visible candles or additional decorations beyond the printed image and piped border.
description: A rectangular cake with a colorful edible image on top, bordered by piped yellow icing. The design is festive and eye-catching, ideal for celebrations.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full top surface with the vibrant edible image and the ornate piped border clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the cake's thin profile and plain sides, with minimal decoration visible.
description_view_2: The rear view is similar to the front, displaying the printed image and piped border, but from the opposite angle.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the cake's slim profile, emphasizing its flatness and lack of side decoration.
